mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate lowers the equity discount rate and relaxes financial conditions, so S&P 500 returns are positive over the next month when policy is easing. The signal fails if rate cuts occur during a recessionary panic and equities still sell off.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are negative in more than 55% of months with a 3-month decline in FEDFUNDS, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in RSAFS above its recent trend signals stronger consumer demand and better near-term revenue expectations, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next month. The effect fails when sales strength is driven by inflation rather than real volume.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises above its 6-month moving average by 1.5%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered events produce nonpositive 20-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the signal loses predictive power after excluding periods of above-trend CPIAUCSL.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate marks weakening household income and deteriorating cyclical profits, so S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 20 trading days after labor market deterioration. The signal weakens once unemployment has already peaked and markets begin pricing a recovery.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if SPX delivers positive 20-day returns in more than 45% of unemployment-shock episodes, or if the signal reverses sign after controlling for FEDFUNDS.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in INDPRO reflects weakening industrial output and lower aggregate earnings momentum, which should pressure equities over the next month. The mechanism fails when lower production is offset by a strong monetary easing response.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below its 3-month average by 1%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered INDPRO weakness is followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 55% of cases, or if the effect disappears when FEDFUNDS is unchanged.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth and HOUST both improve together, the economy is generating income and housing demand simultaneously, which supports cyclical earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. Either series alone is insufficient because the signal depends on broad demand confirmation.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition of rising PAYEMS and rising HOUST does not outperform each series alone, or if 60-day forward SPX returns are not positive in a majority of joint-improvement episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in CPIAUCSL combined with unchanged or still-low FEDFUNDS tightens real rates, compresses valuation multiples, and should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month. The mechanism fails if inflation rises but policy is already aggressively tightening and the market has fully repriced it.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates above its 6-month average while FEDFUNDS remains below CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation
failure_condition: Reject if negative real-rate episodes do not precede weaker 20-day SPX returns than baseline, or if the sign is neutral after conditioning on the CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS spread.

mechanism_narrative: In a labor-market stress regime, an accelerating UNRATE combined with falling PAYEMS signals broad income loss and higher default risk, so equities should decline over the next 5 trading days. The signal is not expected to work in strong monetary easing regimes that offset labor weakness.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint deterioration of UNRATE and PAYEMS is not followed by negative 5-day SPX returns in at least 60% of episodes, or if the effect is overturned when FEDFUNDS is falling sharply.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in INDPRO after a prior slump signals improving corporate production and margins, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the following quarter. The signal is strongest only after a clear contraction phase; in steady-state expansion it should fade.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO turns up and rises above its 3-month low by at least 1%
failure_condition: Reject if rebounds in INDPRO fail to precede positive 60-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the signal is indistinguishable from zero outside recession recovery windows.
